page_metadata.biotools__summary: A freely available web application to automatically check the quality of SNP data employing the ABI 7900 HT-platform or the Sequenom iPLEX platform: Single raw output files of plates are automatically merged and converted to genotype lists.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A freely available web application to automatically check the quality of SNP data employing the ABI 7900 HT-platform or the Sequenom iPLEX platform: Single raw output files of plates are automatically merged and converted to genotype lists.
